subject: Re: Freestate Shooters Girls' Soccer
body:
tell them yes


----- Original Message ----
From: Gmax <gmax1@ellmax.com>
To: jeeproject@yahoo.com
Sent: Thursday, September 6, 2007 12:18:11 PM
Subject: Fw: Freestate Shooters Girls' Soccer


I should give them a yes or no response probably

G

PS My e mail has changed to gmax1@ellmax.com - plse make a note

----- Original Message -----
From: DAllenesq@aol.com <DAllenesq@aol.com>
To: Gmax
Cc: MBCBMJLEE@aol.com <MBCBMJLEE@aol.com>
Sent: Thu Aug 30 12:15:37 2007
Subject: Re: Freestate Shooters Girls' Soccer

Hi Ghislaine.

I hope all is well.  I am writing to follow-up on our previous e-mails.

As we start our new soccer season, the final and most important chapter in the team's overall development and growth, I am hoping that we will continue to have C.O.U.Q. Foundation's support to help the girls to achieve excellence in the sport they love so dearly.

Thank you so much,
David Allen
410-451-1005 


**************************************
